display.purpose: One hero heading per screen (prompt screen only).

body.purpose: System font stack; carries nearly all UI text.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #a855f7; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 14px 28px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; transition: background 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.12), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.15), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.3); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7C3AED; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(168,85,247,.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.25); }

components.name: Glass Panel
components.description: Frosted card container for content sections.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: rgba(26,28,36,.4); backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(130%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(130%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 28px; padding: 16px; color: #f2f3f5; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.12), 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.3); }

components.name: Glass Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,.05); color: #f2f3f5; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius: 20px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 16px; transition: box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(242,243,245,.62); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #a855f7; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(168,85,247,.35); }

components.name: Dock Nav Item
components.description: Bottom dock tab, active state in Electric Violet.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { background: transparent; border: none; color: rgba(242,243,245,.62); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 999px; transition: color 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #a855f7; background: rgba(168,85,247,.15); }

components.name: Suggestion Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { background: rgba(255,255,255,.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09); color: #f2f3f5; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 14px; transition: background 0.18s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(168,85,247,.35); }

narrative.overview: Glass exists but recedes. The app is a calm, near-black room inside Telegram where frosted panels float just enough to organize content — the prompt, the tracks, the player — and never enough to become the show. Blur, specular insets, and translucency are structural material, not decoration: every glass surface earns its place by separating a layer of hierarchy. The personality is calm minimal utility: fast, direct, unceremonious, Russian-language voice. The system explicitly rejects the Spotify-clone look (green-on-black, browsing-first density) and the cheap default-Telegram-bot look (unstyled lists, emoji-as-design).
keyCharacteristics: Near-black base (#050508) with dual light scheme (#EEEEF3), driven by Telegram theme.
One accent — Electric Violet — reserved for primary actions and active state.
Glass panels with structural blur (22–24px) and specular top-edge insets.
System fonts for UI; Golos Text only for display headings.
Short, state-conveying motion (0.18s ease; 0.35s morph for layout shifts).

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Violet appears only on interactive or active elements — never as ambient decoration, background wash, or gradient text.

rules.name: The One Room Rule
rules.body: All surfaces derive from the scheme's base plus white/black alpha. No third hue family enters the neutral stack.

rules.name: The One Headline Rule
rules.body: At most one display-size heading per screen; everything else stays in the body/title band.

rules.name: The Three Layers Rule
rules.body: A screen has at most three depth tiers: background, panels, floating chrome (dock/player). Nothing floats above the chrome except the OS.

dos: Do reserve Electric Violet (#a855f7) for interactive/active elements (The Signal Rule).
Do ship opaque fallbacks for every glass surface (prefers-reduced-transparency, missing backdrop-filter).
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every transition — crossfade or instant.
Do keep body text ≥4.5:1 against the effective glass background in both schemes.
Do keep transitions at 0.18s ease; 0.35s only for layout morphs.
donts: Don't imitate Spotify — no green-on-black identity, no browsing-first layouts.
Don't regress to a cheap Telegram bot UI — no unstyled lists, no emoji-as-design.
Don't add glass-on-glass nesting (a glass card inside a glass panel) — one glass layer per depth tier.
Don't use violet as ambient decoration, gradient text, or background wash.
Don't exceed three depth tiers on a screen.
